tools.name: atlassianUserInfo
tools.description: Get current user info

tools.name: getAccessibleAtlassianResources
tools.description: Get cloudId to make tool calls. When a link is provided (e.g. https://site.atlassian.net/*), try passing the site hostname (e.g. site.atlassian.net) as cloudId to other tools first; if that fails, use this tool to list accessible resources.

tools.name: getConfluencePage
tools.description: Get a Confluence page or blog post by ID, including body content.

pageId.description: Page or blog post ID, or a Confluence tiny link ID (the encoded part from /wiki/x/ URLs, e.g., Fc1bBw)

contentType.description: Type of content: page or blog post

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: searchConfluenceUsingCql
tools.description: Search content with CQL

cql.description: CQL query string (e.g., "title ~ "meeting" AND type = page")

tools.name: getConfluenceSpaces
tools.description: Get spaces

tools.name: getPagesInConfluenceSpace
tools.description: Get pages or blog posts in a space

contentType.description: Type of content: page or blog post

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

contentType.description: Type of content: page or blog post

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: getConfluenceCommentChildren
tools.description: Get reply(child) comments for a comment

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: getConfluencePageDescendants
tools.description: Get child pages of specified page

pageId.description: Page or blog post ID, or a Confluence tiny link ID (the encoded part from /wiki/x/ URLs, e.g., Fc1bBw)

tools.name: createConfluencePage
tools.description: Create a Confluence page or blog post

contentType.description: Type of content: page or blog post

parentId.description: Parent page ID (pages only, ignored for blogs)

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

subtype.description: Page subtype (pages only, ignored for blogs)

tools.name: updateConfluencePage
tools.description: Update a Confluence page or blog post

pageId.description: Page or blog post ID, or a Confluence tiny link ID (the encoded part from /wiki/x/ URLs, e.g., Fc1bBw)

contentType.description: Type of content: page or blog post

parentId.description: Parent page ID (pages only, ignored for blogs)

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

includeBody.description: If true, include the page body in the response; if false, omit it to reduce payload size.

tools.name: createConfluenceFooterComment
tools.description: Create a footer comment on a page or blog post

pageId.description: Page or blog post ID, or a Confluence tiny link ID (the encoded part from /wiki/x/ URLs, e.g., Fc1bBw)

contentType.description: Type of content: page or blog post

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: createConfluenceInlineComment
tools.description: Create an inline comment on specific text in a page or blog post

pageId.description: Page or blog post ID, or a Confluence tiny link ID (the encoded part from /wiki/x/ URLs, e.g., Fc1bBw)

contentType.description: Type of content: page or blog post

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: getJiraIssue
tools.description: Get issue details

issueIdOrKey.description: Issue ID or key (e.g., PROJ-123 or 10000)

responseContentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: editJiraIssue
tools.description: Update issue

issueIdOrKey.description: Issue ID or key (e.g., PROJ-123 or 10000)

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

responseContentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: createJiraIssue
tools.description: Create issue

additional_fields.description: REQUIRED for custom fields. This is the ONLY parameter to set priority, labels, custom fields, or any other Jira fields not listed above. Pass a JSON object with field names as keys. Example: {"priority": {"name": "High"}, "labels": ["bug"], "customfield_10001": "value"}.

id.description: The workflow transition ID to apply during issue creation

transition.description: Optional workflow transition to apply during creation. Use getTransitionsForJiraIssue to find valid transition IDs. Placed at top level of Jira API request, not inside fields.

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

responseContentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.description: Get transitions

issueIdOrKey.description: Issue ID or key (e.g., PROJ-123 or 10000)

tools.name: getJiraIssueRemoteIssueLinks
tools.description: Get remote links

issueIdOrKey.description: Issue ID or key (e.g., PROJ-123 or 10000)

tools.name: getVisibleJiraProjects
tools.description: Get projects

tools.name: getJiraProjectIssueTypesMetadata
tools.description: Get issue types

tools.name: getJiraIssueTypeMetaWithFields
tools.description: Get field metadata

tools.name: addCommentToJiraIssue
tools.description: Add comment

issueIdOrKey.description: Issue ID or key (e.g., PROJ-123 or 10000)

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

responseContentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: transitionJiraIssue
tools.description: Transition issue status

issueIdOrKey.description: Issue ID or key (e.g., PROJ-123 or 10000)

tools.name: searchJiraIssuesUsingJql
tools.description: Search issues with JQL

responseContentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: lookupJiraAccountId
tools.description: Lookup user IDs

tools.name: addWorklogToJiraIssue
tools.description: Add or update a worklog on a Jira issue. When worklogId is provided, updates that worklog;

issueIdOrKey.description: Issue ID or key (e.g., PROJ-123 or 10000)

timeSpent.description: Time spent (e.g. 2h, 30m, 4d). Required for new worklogs; use to set or change time when updating.

worklogId.description: ID of an existing worklog to update. If omitted, a new worklog is created.

started.description: When the work was started (ISO 8601 date-time, e.g. 2026-03-09T09:00:00.000+0000). If omitted, the worklog is booked at the current date/time.

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: getIssueLinkTypes
tools.description: Get available Jira issue link types (e.g. Blocks, Duplicate, Clones, Relates). For createIssueLink: inwardIssue = blocker, outwardIssue = blocked (e.g. "A is blocked by B" → inwardIssue: B, outwardIssue: A).

tools.name: createIssueLink
tools.description: Create a link between two Jira issues. For directional link types (e.g. Blocks): inwardIssue = issue that blocks, outwardIssue = issue that is blocked (e.g. "A is blocked by B" → inwardIssue: B, outwardIssue: A). Use getIssueLinkTypes if link type is unknown.

type.description: Link type name (e.g. Duplicate, Blocks, Clones, Relates). Use getIssueLinkTypes to list available types.

comment.description: Optional comment on the outward issue.

contentFormat.description: Content format: "adf" (Atlassian Document Format, JSON) for full fidelity with mentions, panels, and Smart Links, or "markdown" for simplified text. Defaults to ADF when omitted.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search Jira and Confluence using Rovo Search, ALWAYS use this tool to search for Jira and Confluence content unless the word CQL or JQL is used in the context

cloudId.description: Not needed for this tool — cloudId is derived from your access token automatically

query.description: The search query to use for Rovo Search

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Get details of a Jira issue or Confluence page by ARI (Atlassian Resource Identifier), if the id is not an ARI, then use a different tool to fetch the content

cloudId.description: Not needed for this tool — cloudId is extracted from the ARI automatically

id.description: Atlassian Resource Identifier (ARI) from search results, e.g., "ari:cloud:jira:cloudId:issue/10107" or "ari:cloud:confluence:cloudId:page/123456789"
